description_long: This is a pair of modern residential houses situated side by side, each with distinct architectural features. The house on the left features a flat roof with a rooftop terrace, large windows, and a garage, while the house on the right has a more traditional boxy form with symmetrical window placement and a small front yard. Both houses are surrounded by minimal landscaping, including several trees and a driveway that connects to the street. The facades are primarily light-colored, with some darker accents on the roof and window frames. The left house has a prominent balcony and a covered entryway, while the right house has a simple, recessed main entrance. Vehicles and additional urban elements such as sidewalks and curbs are present, enhancing the urban neighborhood context.
description: A pair of modern residential houses with flat roofs, large windows, and minimal landscaping, set in an urban neighborhood with driveways and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses, their main facades, entryways, garages, and the street with landscaping.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyards, rooftop terrace, and the overall layout of the houses from behind.
description_view_2: Opposite front view focusing on the rear facades, balconies, and the arrangement of windows and doors.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the side elevations, rooftop features, and driveway access.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows and some asymmetrical placements
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways are recessed or covered, with one featuring a small porch and steps, and the other a simple, modern door with minimal ornamentation.
